name: testtag-for-wp
description: Automatically tag any element on your WordPress site with test attributes for Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, or any automation framework.

scripts.test:screenshots: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=default
scripts.test:screenshots:default: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=default
scripts.test:screenshots:data-cy: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=data-cy
scripts.quick:test: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=default --workers=1
scripts.quick:test:default: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=default --workers=1
scripts.quick:test:data-cy: cross-env USE_DOCKER=true CI=true SKIP_WEB_SERVER=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=data-cy --workers=1
scripts.wp:docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
